idea.title: Social Media Ad Copy Variations Toolkit
idea.description: 40 prompts for paid media managers to generate multiple headline, body copy, and CTA variations for Facebook and Instagram ads across different buyer awareness stages.
idea.rationale: Paid media managers have urgent, recurring demand for copy variations; AI excels at generating structured ad copy permutations across awareness stages, and a 40-prompt toolkit with framework specificity is hard to replicate with generic free resources.
